title: T-024 — Idempotency: UUID v7 + 1h cache for scheduler_runs
prompt:
# T-024 — Idempotency: UUID v7 + 1h cache for scheduler_runs

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §5.1.2 idempotent runs (R14), §8.2 POST /run cache contract
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement idempotency middleware ensuring same client-supplied UUID v7 run_id within 1h returns cached scheduler_runs result; mismatched params at same run_id raises 409.

## Implementation contract
1. New helper `apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/idempotency.ts` exporting `checkAndCache(run_id, params): {status:'fresh'|'cached'|'conflict', cached_run?:Run}`.
2. Validate run_id is UUID v7 (version field == 7); reject other versions with 400.
3. Look up scheduler_runs by run_id; compare input params hash (line_ids, horizon, optimizer_version) with stored input_snapshot hash; equal → cache hit; differ → 409.
4. Cache window: queued_at within last 1h.

## Files
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/idempotency.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/uuid-v7.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/__tests__/idempotency.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given run_id X with params P at t=0, when same X+P submitted at t=30min, then status='cached' returned (cache hit)
2. Given run_id X with params P at t=0, when same X with different P submitted at t=30min, then status='conflict' returned (caller maps to 409)
3. Given run_id with UUID v4 (not v7), when checkAndCache runs, then it raises validation error before DB lookup

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/__tests__/idempotency.test.ts covering cache hit + 409 + UUID version validation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/idempotency'

## Risk red lines
- Do not accept UUID v4 / v1 (R14 explicitly requires v7 for time-ordered behavior)
- Do not return cached result if params differ (must 409 for safety)
- Do not extend cache window beyond 1h without ADR (PRD-locked)

pipeline_inputs.description: UUID v7 validation + 1h param-hash idempotency cache; conflict on param drift at same run_id.
pipeline_inputs.details: Helper validates v7, hashes input params, compares against stored input_snapshot. Cache hit returns stored run; conflict returns marker for caller to surface 409. Hard 1h window per PRD R14.
out_of_scope: Do not implement run dispatch here (T-012)
Do not generate UUID v7 server-side (client-supplied per PRD)
Do not extend cache to other resources
acceptance_criteria: Given run_id X with params P at t=0, when same X+P submitted at t=30min, then status='cached' returned
Given run_id X with params P at t=0, when same X with different P submitted at t=30min, then status='conflict' returned
Given run_id with UUID v4, when checkAndCache runs, then it raises validation error before DB lookup
test_strategy: RED: write __tests__/idempotency.test.ts covering cache hit + 409 + v7-only validation
risk_red_lines: Do not return cached result if params differ
Do not extend cache window beyond 1h without ADR
